summary: UI Polish pass verification for Philos Orientation Hebrew RTL dashboard. All features working correctly: RTL layout, animations, tab navigation styling, consistent spacing, progress bar animations.
critical_code_review_comments: GOOD: RTL layout - body has direction:rtl, all sections have dir='rtl' attribute
GOOD: Tab navigation has rounded-2xl and backdrop-blur-sm classes
GOOD: Inactive tabs have hover:text-foreground hover:bg-white/50 states
GOOD: Consistent spacing - space-y-5 used throughout tab content areas
GOOD: Progress bars have transition-all duration-1000 ease-out for smooth animation
GOOD: philos-section class count: 5 sections using consistent card styling
GOOD: animate-section classes present on 7 elements with staggered delays (animate-section-1 through animate-section-8)
GOOD: animate-glow-in class present on 2 elements (percentile numbers)
GOOD: Share button has hover:shadow-md and active:scale-[0.98] for polish effects
GOOD: Mission progress bar animates from 0% width using transition classes
GOOD: Impact message after daily answer has animate-section animate-section-2 class
GOOD: OrientationCircles shows 4 cards with staggered entrance animation
GOOD: WeeklyInsightSection has RTL dir attribute and text-right labels
GOOD: OrientationIndexPage has animated vertical bars with staggered entrance
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI Polish pass tested: (1) All sections have dir='rtl' for Hebrew RTL layout, (2) Tab navigation uses rounded-2xl backdrop-blur-sm with hover states on inactive tabs, (3) space-y-5 consistent spacing in tab content areas, (4) Progress bars animate via transition-all duration-1000 ease-out, (5) animate-section classes with delays 1-8, (6) philos-section class provides consistent card styling, (7) Share button has hover:shadow-md active:scale effects, (8) animate-glow-in on percentile numbers

backend_api_tests./api/orientation/mission-today: PASS - returns direction, mission_he, description_he, participants, target, progress_percent
backend_api_tests./api/orientation/circles: PASS - returns contribution, recovery, order, exploration counts

ui_polish_tests.tab_hover_states: PASS - Inactive tabs have hover:text-foreground hover:bg-white/50
ui_polish_tests.circles_entrance_animation: PASS - 4 circle items with staggered opacity/transform transition

css_animations_verified.fadeInUp: Used by animate-section class - sections fade up on load
css_animations_verified.barFill: Used by progress bars - fills from 0% width
css_animations_verified.completionPulse: Used by animate-completion - subtle pulse on daily question completion
css_animations_verified.glowIn: Used by animate-glow-in - number appears with blur-to-clear effect
